ItemConfigs.Name: Dirt
ItemConfigs.Description: The very ground beneath your feet. Humble, plentiful, and surprisingly useful.

ItemConfigs.Name: Ad Key
ItemConfigs.Description: A peculiar key with an otherworldly shimmer. Just watching the right thing grants you entry.

ItemConfigs.Name: Rare Key
ItemConfigs.Description: A finely crafted key that opens chests of extraordinary wealth. Hard to come by, worth the effort.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mythic Key
ItemConfigs.Description: Some say the chest it opens has never been found twice in the same place.

ItemConfigs.Name: Divine Key
ItemConfigs.Description: Forged by the hands of gods, or so the legends claim. Opens only what mortals dare not imagine.

ItemConfigs.Name: Log
ItemConfigs.Description: A freshly felled trunk, still smelling of the forest. The backbone of any early crafting session.

ItemConfigs.Name: Torch
ItemConfigs.Description: Flickers bravely against the dark. Gel and wood bound together — a miner's best companion.

ItemConfigs.Name: Arrow
ItemConfigs.Description: Swift, straight, and deadly. Pack plenty — you'll need them.

ItemConfigs.Name: Coal
ItemConfigs.Description: Ancient wood, crushed and darkened by ages of pressure. Burns hot and long.

ItemConfigs.Name: Sand
ItemConfigs.Description: Countless tiny grains, each one a story of erosion. Great for glass — less great in your boots.

ItemConfigs.Name: Nature Wings
ItemConfigs.Description: Woven from living leaves and forest vines. They carry the wind of the treetops with every beat.

ItemConfigs.Name: Thornwood Wings
ItemConfigs.Description: Reinforced with ancient thornwood. Jagged, fast, and utterly silent in flight.

ItemConfigs.Name: Gel
ItemConfigs.Description: Wobbles like a slime, smells like a dungeon. Whatever it was before, it's crafting material now.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mushroom
ItemConfigs.Description: Grown in the dark, thrives in damp caves. An alchemist's favourite ingredient.

ItemConfigs.Name: Copper Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: A reddish-brown ore found near the surface. The first step on every miner's journey.

ItemConfigs.Name: Iron Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: Dense and grey, forged in the earth's depths. Reliable as the weapons it will become.

ItemConfigs.Name: Silver Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: Gleams softly in torchlight, as if reluctant to leave the dark. Monsters have reason to fear it.

ItemConfigs.Name: Gold Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: Glittering veins of fortune buried deep underground. Worth every swing to find.

ItemConfigs.Name: Copper Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Smelted copper ore, ready to be shaped. A modest bar with a bright future.

ItemConfigs.Name: Iron Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Cold, heavy, and unyielding. The material of champions and the bane of monsters.

ItemConfigs.Name: Silver Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Pure, refined silver. Said to carry a faint blessing against creatures of darkness.

ItemConfigs.Name: Gold Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Gleaming and precious. Not the hardest metal, but undeniably the most coveted.

ItemConfigs.Name: Diamond
ItemConfigs.Description: The hardest stone known to any miner. Clear as a crystal spring, and twice as rare.

ItemConfigs.Name: Ruby
ItemConfigs.Description: A deep crimson gemstone burning with inner fire. Prized by warriors and jewellers alike.

ItemConfigs.Name: Emerald
ItemConfigs.Description: Lush and green as a sunlit forest, yet forged in the cold dark below. Nature's finest gem.

ItemConfigs.Name: Sapphire
ItemConfigs.Description: Blue as a midnight sky, cool to the touch, and impossibly beautiful. Mages covet this stone greatly.

ItemConfigs.Name: Topaz
ItemConfigs.Description: A warm golden gem that catches light like sunrise. Brings good fortune to those who carry it.

ItemConfigs.Name: Aquamarine
ItemConfigs.Description: Pale blue and translucent, like frozen seawater caught in stone. Sailors once called it a lucky charm.

ItemConfigs.Name: SpessartiteGarnet
ItemConfigs.Description: A fiery orange gem, brighter than embers. Alchemists prize it for its volatile energy.

ItemConfigs.Name: Amethyst
ItemConfigs.Description: A deep violet crystal, calm and mysterious. Often used in enchanting rituals and magical wards.

ItemConfigs.Name: Morganite
ItemConfigs.Description: A blushing pink gemstone, delicate as a petal yet hard as stone. Rare and highly sought after.

ItemConfigs.Name: Onyx
ItemConfigs.Description: Pitch black and smooth as shadow. Ancient cultures believed it absorbed evil. Maybe they were right.

ItemConfigs.Name: Health Potion I
ItemConfigs.Description: Restore 50 Health

ItemConfigs.Name: Health Potion II
ItemConfigs.Description: Restore 100 Health

ItemConfigs.Name: Health Potion III
ItemConfigs.Description: Restore 150 Health

ItemConfigs.Name: Health Potion IV
ItemConfigs.Description: Restore 200 Health

ItemConfigs.Name: Health Potion V
ItemConfigs.Description: Restore 250 Health

ItemConfigs.Name: Regeneration Potion I
ItemConfigs.Description: Grants Regeneration For 30 Seconds, Healing 2 Hp Per Second.

ItemConfigs.Name: Regeneration Potion II
ItemConfigs.Description: Grants Regeneration For 30 Seconds, Healing 4 Hp Per Second.

ItemConfigs.Name: Regeneration Potion III
ItemConfigs.Description: Grants Regeneration For 30 Seconds, Healing 6 Hp Per Second.

ItemConfigs.Name: Regeneration Potion IV
ItemConfigs.Description: Grants Regeneration For 30 Seconds, Healing 8 Hp Per Second.

ItemConfigs.Name: Regeneration Potion V
ItemConfigs.Description: Grants Regeneration For 30 Seconds, Healing 10 Hp Per Second.

ItemConfigs.Name: Swiftness Potion I
ItemConfigs.Description: Increases Movement Speed By 20% For 4 Minutes.

ItemConfigs.Name: Swiftness Potion II
ItemConfigs.Description: Increases Movement Speed By 40% For 8 Minutes.

ItemConfigs.Name: Cobalt_Trident
ItemConfigs.Description:
150 damage
50% critical strike chance
3 knockback

ItemConfigs.Name: Wooden Wand
ItemConfigs.Description: A humble wand carved from a knotted branch. Channelling magic through it feels a little scratchy, but it works.

ItemConfigs.Name: Stone
ItemConfigs.Description: Solid, sturdy, and everywhere underground. The humble foundation of any great structure.

ItemConfigs.Name: Wood
ItemConfigs.Description: Hewn and shaped, ready for crafting. Every pickaxe handle, every bow — starts here.

ItemConfigs.Name: Clay
ItemConfigs.Description: Soft and pliable, waiting to be shaped by skilled hands. Fire it and it becomes something permanent.

ItemConfigs.Name: Gravel
ItemConfigs.Description: Loose rocks that crumble underfoot. Watch your step — and check beneath it for flint.

ItemConfigs.Name: Flint
ItemConfigs.Description: Strike it right and it throws sparks. The original fire-starter, trusted since the first campfire.

ItemConfigs.Name: Grass
ItemConfigs.Description: A clump of green from near the surface world. Smells like fresh air — a rare luxury underground.

ItemConfigs.Name: Water Bucket
ItemConfigs.Description: Sloshing with cool, clear water. Place it carefully — water has a way of going everywhere.

ItemConfigs.Name: Lava Bucket
ItemConfigs.Description: Somehow you are carrying this. Don't tip it. Don't even think about tipping it.

ItemConfigs.Name: Diamond Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: A rough stone hiding a glittering heart. Only the finest pickaxes can reveal what's inside.

ItemConfigs.Name: Ice
ItemConfigs.Description: Frozen solid deep in the earth's coldest depths. Melts quickly above ground — hurry up.

ItemConfigs.Name: Moss
ItemConfigs.Description: Soft and damp, clinging to ancient stone. Where there is moss, there is water nearby.

ItemConfigs.Name: Snow
ItemConfigs.Description: Gathered from the frostbitten peaks above. Cold, light, and oddly satisfying to hold.

ItemConfigs.Name: Glass
ItemConfigs.Description: Sand melted and cooled into clarity. Fragile, but indispensable for bottles, lenses, and more.

ItemConfigs.Name: Oak Leaves
ItemConfigs.Description: Broad, sturdy oak leaves, dried and gathered. Rustles pleasantly in a breeze.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mangrove Leaves
ItemConfigs.Description: Waxy and resilient, grown where land meets water. Still damp from roots long buried in the mud.

ItemConfigs.Name: Pine Leaves
ItemConfigs.Description: Sharp needles bundled together, smelling of cold mountain air. Great for potions and kindling alike.

ItemConfigs.Name: Cherry Blossom Leaves
ItemConfigs.Description: Delicate pink petals caught mid-fall. Too beautiful for a dungeon, yet here they are.

ItemConfigs.Name: Slimeling Core
ItemConfigs.Description:
Material
A pulsing core dropped by the Prince Slime
Used to exchange for rank upgrade certificates

ItemConfigs.Name: Demon Mushroom
ItemConfigs.Description: A fungi that pulses with dark energy. Whatever it grew from, it's best not to ask.

ItemConfigs.Name: Beech Leaves
ItemConfigs.Description: Smooth and oval, shining faintly in autumn gold. Harvested from towering beech trees.

ItemConfigs.Name: Onyx Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Polished black blocks that seem to swallow light. Builds walls that feel more like voids.

ItemConfigs.Name: Morganite Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Soft rose-coloured bricks with a subtle inner glow. Rare enough to make any room feel royal.

ItemConfigs.Name: Amethyst Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Deep violet bricks that hum faintly with residual magic. Even cut into blocks, their power lingers.

ItemConfigs.Name: Spessartite Garnet Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Fiery orange masonry that glows faintly as if still smouldering. Hot to the touch in direct sunlight.

ItemConfigs.Name: Aquamarine Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Cool sea-blue blocks that make any structure feel like an ancient underwater ruin.

ItemConfigs.Name: Topaz Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Warm golden bricks that catch every ray of light. A builder's most expensive flex.

ItemConfigs.Name: Sapphire Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Deep blue bricks cold to the touch. Walls built from these feel like frozen midnight.

ItemConfigs.Name: Emerald Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Rich green masonry that brings the lush forest underground. Almost too pretty to mine.

ItemConfigs.Name: Ruby Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Crimson blocks that glow like smouldering coals. Hallways built from these feel ominous — and magnificent.

ItemConfigs.Name: Diamond Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Clear and almost impossibly hard. Any structure built with these is built to last forever.

ItemConfigs.Name: Cracked Stone Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Old stone bricks worn thin by time and pressure. Crumbling at the edges but still holding shape.

ItemConfigs.Name: Smooth Sand Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Sand pressed and heated into a uniform, clean brick. Desert builders swear by it.

ItemConfigs.Name: Smooth Sand
ItemConfigs.Description: Sand that has been refined and compressed into a smooth, solid slab. No longer gets in your boots.

ItemConfigs.Name: Sand Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Coarse and pale, crumbling slightly at the edges. Still sturdy enough for desert construction.

ItemConfigs.Name: Lilypad
ItemConfigs.Description: A flat, floating leaf plucked from a still pond. Smells faintly of algae and summer rain.

ItemConfigs.Name: Morganite Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: A morganite gem infused with light. Gives off a gentle pink glow, warm as candlelight.

ItemConfigs.Name: Amethyst Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: An amethyst that has absorbed too much magic and now glows with a steady violet radiance.

ItemConfigs.Name: Spessartite Garnet Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: A garnet burning from within. Its orange light flickers like a living flame that never goes out.

ItemConfigs.Name: Aquamarine Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: Glows with a cool, underwater blue light. Placing one makes any room feel like the bottom of the sea.

ItemConfigs.Name: Topaz Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: A topaz radiating warm golden light. Like having a pocket sunrise in your inventory.

ItemConfigs.Name: Sapphire Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: A sapphire that glows with a cold blue radiance. Lights your way without warming anything.

ItemConfigs.Name: Emerald Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: Glows with a lush green light, as if the forest itself chose to live inside this gem.

ItemConfigs.Name: Ruby Lightstone
ItemConfigs.Description: A ruby blazing with deep red light. Its glow makes shadows look dangerous — they might be.

ItemConfigs.Name: Hay Bale
ItemConfigs.Description: Bundled dried grass from the surface fields. Comfortingly pastoral in such an unpleasant place.

ItemConfigs.Name: Snow Brick
ItemConfigs.Description: Compacted snow pressed into a solid block. Builds beautifully — until someone lights a torch nearby.

ItemConfigs.Name: Tin Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: A silvery-grey ore found layered between stone. Light and workable, once you smelt it down.

ItemConfigs.Name: Lead Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: Heavy and dull, weighing down every pocket. Unglamorous but invaluable for crafting sturdy gear.

ItemConfigs.Name: Amberstone
ItemConfigs.Description: A warm, resin-coloured mineral that glows faintly under light. Tougher than it looks.

ItemConfigs.Name: Tungsten Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: An extraordinarily dense metal ore. Miners joke that it's heavier than the mountain itself.

ItemConfigs.Name: Platinum Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: Rare and gleaming silver-white ore from the deep earth. Worth more than most adventurers will ever see.

ItemConfigs.Name: Cobalt Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: A vivid blue ore with a metallic sheen. Hard as iron, and far more striking.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mythril Ore
ItemConfigs.Description: A legendary ore, barely believable. They say it carries a trace of starlight in every vein.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mana Potion I
ItemConfigs.Description: Restores 50 Mana.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mana Potion II
ItemConfigs.Description: Restores 100 Mana.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mana Potion III
ItemConfigs.Description: Restores 150 Mana.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mana Potion IV
ItemConfigs.Description: Restores 200 Mana.

ItemConfigs.Name: Mana Potion V
ItemConfigs.Description: Restores 250 Mana.

ItemConfigs.Name: Tin Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Light and easy to work with. Tin may not be glamorous, but it holds its shape reliably.

ItemConfigs.Name: Lead Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Dense and weighty. Not the prettiest bar on the shelf, but it gets the job done.

ItemConfigs.Name: Amberstone Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Smelted amberstone, warm to the touch and faintly translucent. Unusual and highly versatile.

ItemConfigs.Name: Tungsten Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Brutally heavy, incrEdibly hard. The weapons forged from this bar do not forgive.

ItemConfigs.Name: Platinum Ingot
ItemConfigs.Description: Rare and luminous. Crafting with platinum is a sign that you've come a very long way.

ItemConfigs.Name: Strings
ItemConfigs.Description: Tough fibrous cord, twisted tight. Essential for bows, traps, and anything that needs to hold together.

ItemConfigs.Name: Cobweb
ItemConfigs.Description: Silky strands left behind by something large and eight-legged. Suspiciously fresh.

ItemConfigs.Name: Cactus
ItemConfigs.Description: Prickly on the outside, useful on the inside. Handle with care — it already stuck you once.

ItemConfigs.Name: Rail
ItemConfigs.Description: Iron strips that guide carts through the tunnels. Every great mine starts with a single rail.

ItemConfigs.Name: Onyx Wand
ItemConfigs.Description: A wand of polished onyx, black as the void. The spells it casts carry a shadow that lingers.

ItemConfigs.Name: Morganite Staff
ItemConfigs.Description: A slender staff topped with a glowing morganite crystal. Its magic feels warm and almost gentle.

ItemConfigs.Name: Amethyst Staff
ItemConfigs.Description: Crackling with violet arcane energy. Mages who wield this staff dream vividly — not all of them pleasantly.

ItemConfigs.Name: Spessartite Garnet Staff
ItemConfigs.Description: A fiery staff that launches bolts with explosive momentum. Fast, furious, and runs very hot.

ItemConfigs.Name: Aquamarine Staff
ItemConfigs.Description: A fluid, graceful staff channelling the depths of the sea. The spells it casts leave trails of mist.

ItemConfigs.Name: Topaz Staff
ItemConfigs.Description: Radiating warm golden light. A staff that promises fortune to those skilled enough to wield it.

ItemConfigs.Name: Sapphire Staff
ItemConfigs.Description: Channels the cold power of deep sapphire. Each spell fired chills the air around the target.

ItemConfigs.Name: Emerald Staff
ItemConfigs.Description: Hums with natural energy, as if the forest itself flows through it. Its spells bloom like vines.

ItemConfigs.Name: Band Of Regeneration
ItemConfigs.Description: +0.5 Hp/Sec

ItemConfigs.Description: +5 Defense

ItemConfigs.Name: Void Barrier

ItemConfigs.Name: Crimtane Tower Shield

ItemConfigs.Name: Vampire Count's Guard

ItemConfigs.Name: Shadow Scale Mail Piece
ItemConfigs.Description: +14 Defense

ItemConfigs.Name: Celestial Cross
ItemConfigs.Description: +32 Defense

ItemConfigs.Name: Mask of the Saints
ItemConfigs.Description: +33 Defense

ItemConfigs.Name: Serrated Scraper
ItemConfigs.Description: +20% Mining Speed

ItemConfigs.Name: Rough Hewn Cleaver
ItemConfigs.Description: +40% Mining Speed

ItemConfigs.Name: Pebble Pounder
ItemConfigs.Description: +60% Mining Speed

ItemConfigs.Name: Rookie Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Unranked To Rookie. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Unranked.

ItemConfigs.Name: Miner Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Rookie To Miner. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Rookie.

ItemConfigs.Name: Scout Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Miner To Scout. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Miner.

ItemConfigs.Name: Hunter Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Scout To Hunter. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Scout.

ItemConfigs.Name: Elite Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Hunter To Elite. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Hunter.

ItemConfigs.Name: Veteran Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Elite To Veteran. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Elite.

ItemConfigs.Name: Shadow Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Veteran To Shadow. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Veteran.

ItemConfigs.Name: Conqueror Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Shadow To Conqueror. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Shadow.

ItemConfigs.Name: King Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Conqueror To King. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Conqueror.

ItemConfigs.Name: Overlord Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From King To Overlord. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be King.

ItemConfigs.Name: Eternal Certificate
ItemConfigs.Description: Use To Upgrade Your Rank From Overlord To Eternal. Requirement: Your Current Rank Must Be Overlord.
